title: Schoenoplectiella fohaiensis
taxonomy: Schoenoplectiella fohaiensis is classified within the family Cyperaceae, which is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous flowering plants commonly known as sedges. This classification places Schoenoplectiella fohaiensis within the order Poales, a group of flowering plants that also includes grasses and rushes. The genus Schoenoplectiella is a relatively small group of sedge species, and Schoenoplectiella fohaiensis is a unique species within this genus. The classification of Schoenoplectiella fohaiensis is further supported by its shared characteristics with other Cyperaceae species, such as its narrow, grass-like leaves and its ability to thrive in wet environments. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification and relationships of Schoenoplectiella fohaiensis.
